headline: How Investors Are Reacting To KLA (KLAC) Stock Split, Dividend Hike and Capital Return Push
summary: KLA Corporation recently reported third-quarter fiscal 2026 results, with revenue of US$3,415.08 million and GAAP diluted EPS of US$9.12, alongside guidance for fourth-quarter revenue of about US$3.575 billion and EPS of roughly US$9.66. In the same period, KLA completed a multi-year share repurchase program totaling 19.30 million shares for US$9.69 billion and approved a ten-for-one stock split plus a 21% dividend increase, underscoring its focus on returning capital while expanding its...
